caption.full:
Ricky Gervais says audience offense makes his comedy funnier.

Ricky Gervais insists he never aims to offend and claims he has played to a million people with no live audience complaints. He noted that backlash typically erupts when his specials reach a massive online audience, such as on Netflix. Gervais confirmed he has no plans to tone down his material despite online backlash.

What do you think about Gervais's comments on offense and comedy?

youtube.title: Ricky Gervais: 'Be offended if you want,' he tells fans
youtube.description:
Ricky Gervais stated that being offended by his work makes it funnier for him. He confirmed he has no plans to tone down his material despite online backlash, noting that backlash typically erupts when his specials reach a massive online audience like on Netflix. Gervais told audiences he 'doesn't care' if fans are offended.
